# frontend-statsd

## :warning: Deprecated

> [!WARNING]
>
> **Please migrate to [@meli/statsd](https://github.com/melisource/fury_node-common-libs/blob/master/packages/statsd)**. Follow the [migration guide](https://nordic.adminml.com/docs/migration-guides/modules/statsd/migrate-to-meli-statsd).

Allows you to have custom metrics from your server

`frontend-statsd` allows you to track custom metrics from your server using the [StatsD standard](https://thenewstack.io/collecting-metrics-using-statsd-a-standard-for-real-time-monitoring/) (which is used by **Datadog**!).

## :warning: Nordic 9 Warning

> [!WARNING]
>
> **The current version of master is only compatible with Nordic 9. If you are using Nordic 8, please use the previous version of the repository.**
>
> Use [v2.x.x](https://github.com/melisource/fury_frontend-stadst/tree/v2.x.x) for modules compatible with Nordic 8.
